reviews.comment:
Pésimo me despacharon combustible y no prestó atención hizo un derrame, encima me dijo que tengo roto el tanque, totalmente erróneo deberían tener mas precaucion y entrenamiento con el personal que seleccionan, máxime despacho de combustible.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. The attendant didn't pay attention to the fuel and caused a spill. On top of that, he told me my tank was broken, which is completely wrong. They should be more careful and provide better training for their staff, especially for fuel dispensing.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURxOVBHb1pBEAE

reviews.comment:
No lo recomiendo pesima atencion , no derramaron naftavnos hicieron pegar un tremendo susto.

(Translated by Google)
I do not recommend it, terrible service, they didn't spill gasoline, they gave us a tremendous scare.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURxdElland3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Lindo lugar pero con la pandemia no hay mucha oferta de menú y la parrilla está cerrada.
Solo sandwich y bastante caros por ello no compre

(Translated by Google)
Nice place, but with the pandemic, the menu is limited and the grill is closed. They only have sandwiches, and they're quite expensive, so I didn't buy any.
